name: dryforge
description: Intent-to-implementation: elicit or refine a spec and plan grounded in real project code, then orchestrate dependency-aware parallel execution with right-sized review.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and execute implementation work from grounded specs.
interface.longDescription: dryforge turns a goal or existing spec and plan into a grounded 3-doc, then helps Codex execute it with dependency-aware waves, git isolation where needed, and right-sized verification.
defaultPrompt: Use dryforge ready to plan this goal.
Use dryforge set with my spec and plan.
Use dryforge go to execute the 3-doc.
